creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

The port was updated to a new version (1.2.5 -> 2.1.4). 
The submitter has not responded for 20 days if the 
problem persists. Thanks for the PR! 

To the submitter: if you have patches for the new version please 
submit a new PR.
